titleStmt.title: SII 39.231: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 231. (A.R. No. 231 of 1916.) SRIMUSHNAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT. NITYĒŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE WEST WALL OF THE SAME SHRINE RĀJAKĒSARIVAR[MAṈ] •••••••••• KULŌTTUṄGA [CHŌ]ḺADĒVA I30TH YEAR (1100 A.D.)

summary.p: Unfinished. This inscription seems to refers to the gift of dēvadāna lands located in the villages Suṅgandavirttachō[ḻanallūr*] and Ādhivarāhanallūr made to the temple of Tirumuṭṭa muḍaiya mahādēva and to the temple of Śrivarāha-Āḻvār respectively at Muḍigoṇḍachōḻanallūr in Viḷandaiyīr kūṟṟam a sub-division of Iruṅgōḷappāḍi, by the king while he was comping at Tirumaḻuvāḍi in Poygai nāḍu, a sub-division of Gēyavinōda vaḷanāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī ..pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka
ḷa nilava malarmakaḷ puṇara Uri
cūṭi minavar nilaikeṭa villa
ṉaṟuḻi taratti
rājakesarivaṟ śrī kulottuṅka
coḷadevar keyavinota vaḷanāṭṭup meṟ kai nāṭṭut
tirumaḻuvāṭiyil viṭṭaruḷiṉa koyilinuḷḷāl Ekānta kū
ṭattuc cetirājarile muṉtaruḷi Iruntu ceyyat tiruvāy
moḻintaruḷiṉapaṭi Iruṅkoḷappāṭi viḷantaiyiṟ kūṟṟattut
taṟṟām paṭṭān muṭikoṇṭa coḻanallūril śrī varāhāḻvā
ṉukku munpu tevatāṉamāṉa Ātivarāha nallūrum tirumuṭṭamu
ṭaiya mahādevaṟkku muppatāvatu mutal tevatāṉamāṉa cuṅkan tavirtta co
Digital edition of SII 39.231 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
